span.p: 基础设施与外部系统 (Infra & External)

div.style: color: rgb(91, 33, 182) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LLM Provider
运行 solution-suggest / verify

div.style: color: rgb(91, 33, 182) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Jira / GitHub
外部 Issue 创建 (可替换)

div.style: color: rgb(91, 33, 182) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
KnowledgeBase
经验沉淀回知识库

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
FileIssueStore
JSON 文件存储闭环记录

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SolutionSuggester
方案建议 skill 或 SPI

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
VerificationRunner
修复验证 skill 或 SPI

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
KnowledgeSedimentation
经验提取为知识片段

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(49, 46, 129) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
IssueClosureService
编排诊断 → 方案 → 验证 → 沉淀

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(30, 58, 95) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Issue Closure Modal
建议方案 → 创建Issue → 验证 → 关闭
